last_result: Cycle 67 complete. TWO DELIVERABLES: (1) SI #45 CIAP DOMAIN CONFIRMATION #2 — empirical adversarial ML / red-teaming literature. CIAP partition in red-teaming domain formalized: fixed-strategy adversaries (zero-shot LLM red teams, universal adversarial suffixes) instantiate CIAP-holds → linear ceiling; adaptive adversaries (RL-trained red teams, expert human iterative red teams) instantiate CIAP-fails → super-linear ceiling. Evidence: Perez et al. 2022 (RL > zero-shot red teams — adaptive outperforms fixed; gap = CIAP failure signature), Ganguli et al. 2022 (expert human iterative red teamers find harder-to-block harm than template attacks), Zou et al. 2023 (fixed universal suffixes are linearly blockable once detected — CIAP-holds pattern), RLHF reward hacking (Christiano 2017, Stiennon 2020 — training-direction CIAP failure). Confidence SI #45: 0.84-0.86 → 0.86-0.88. DC#2 ontological type: empirical/experimental (distinct from DC#1 theoretical game theory). (2) SI #45 CIAP ZR CYCLE 1 PASSIVE — C66-C67, no retraction of CIAP meta-theorem. D4 pathway status: ZR 1/required, DC 2/required, derivations 2/2. PASSIVE: AIIP ZR cycle 15 (C55-C67). AATE ZR cycle 12 (C56-C67). AAA ZR cycle 1 (D4 promotion C66-C67). D4 streak 59.
